/usr/bin/c++  -pthread  -pthread -lrt CMakeFiles/producer_consumer.dir/producer_consumer_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/producer_consumer.dir/src/shared.cpp.o CMakeFiles/producer_consumer.dir/src/buffer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/producer_consumer.dir/src/logger.cpp.o CMakeFiles/producer_consumer.dir/src/stats.cpp.o CMakeFiles/producer_consumer.dir/src/producer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/producer_consumer.dir/src/consumer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/producer_consumer.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/producer_consumer.dir/src/mainwindow.cpp.o -o bin/producer_consumer  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Widgets.so.5.15.3 -lrt /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Gui.so.5.15.3 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Core.so.5.15.3
